MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-10-2013 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE DATE OF TRIAL. GEORGE OLIVER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ERIC NORLAND APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT ANTHONY NGUYEN. NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/18/13 IS CONTINUED TO 6/2/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE BASED ON SCHEDULE CONFLICTS OF COUNSEL.
